# Golden file: frameworks pack
format: v1
---
# D1: rails db drop
command: rails db:drop
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: frameworks
rule: rails-db-drop
---
# D2: rails db reset in production env escalates to critical
command: RAILS_ENV=production rails db:reset
decision: Deny
severity: Critical
confidence: High
pack: frameworks
rule: rails-db-reset
env_escalated: true
---
# D3: rake db:drop:all
command: rake db:drop:all
decision: Deny
severity: Critical
confidence: High
pack: frameworks
rule: rake-db-drop-all
---
# D4: manage.py flush
command: python manage.py flush
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: frameworks
rule: managepy-flush
---
# D5: manage.py migrate --run-syncdb
command: manage.py migrate --run-syncdb
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: frameworks
rule: managepy-migrate-syncdb
---
# D6: artisan migrate:fresh
command: php artisan migrate:fresh
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: frameworks
rule: artisan-migrate-fresh
---
# D7: mix ecto.reset
command: mix ecto.reset
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: frameworks
rule: mix-ecto-reset
---
# Safe: rails routes
command: rails routes
decision: Allow
